name: Green Enchiladas
recipeIngredient: 10 Flour Or Corn Tortillas (6-inches in diameter, warm)
recipeInstructions:
1. See Sowest 2 for recipe.
2. Prepare basic green sauce and stir in the 1 cup of sour cream. Heat oven to 350 degrees F.
3. Dip each tortilla into the sauce to coat both sides. Spoon 1/4 cup of the shredded chicken onto each tortilla and roll up.
4. Place seam sides down in a 13 X 9 X 2-inch ungreased baking dish. Pour remaining sauce over enchiladas and sprinkle with the cheese.
5. Bake, uncovered, until cheese is melted, about 15 minutes. Serve warm with sour cream.
RED ENCHILADAS:
Substitute 2 cups of the Basic Red Sauce (see Sowest 2 for the recipe) for the Basic Green sauce.
Substitute 3 cups of shredded cheese or cooked beef for the chicken.
